docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEEKER, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARIA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,599.95 FILED BY MEEKER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY MEEKER, DAVID
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $0.00 SERVED OCT-22-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2012 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO NOV-28-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.
